app.name: SuperAccountant
app.tagline: AI tutor for accountants. India and KSA.

welcome.title: Welcome to SuperAccountant
welcome.subtitle: Two questions and we'll place you in the right starting phase.
welcome.step1: Which market do you work in?
welcome.marketIndiaSub: Companies Act, Income Tax, GST, Tally

signIn.title: Sign in to SuperAccountant
signIn.subtitle: Use your Google account or your work email.
signIn.termsNote: By continuing you agree to the terms of use and privacy policy.

verifyRequest.title: Check your email
verifyRequest.body: We sent you a sign-in link. Click it to finish signing in. The link expires in 24 hours.
verifyRequest.tip: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

error.title: Authentication error
error.default: Something went wrong. Please try signing in again.
error.verification: The sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
